modern_navigation_basic.code:
import streamlit as st
from pages_lib import home, data, settings

pages = {
    'Home': st.Page(home.show, title='Home', icon='🏠'),
    'Data': st.Page(data.show, title='Data Analysis', icon='📊'),
    'Settings': st.Page(settings.show, title='Settings', icon='⚙️')
}

pg = st.navigation(pages)
pg.run()

grouped_navigation.description: Grouped navigation with sections (using functions, no pages/ folder)

programmatic_page_switch.code:
# Note: st.switch_page works with file paths OR page objects
# With file paths (if using separate files):
if condition:
    st.switch_page('other_page.py')  # No pages/ folder needed

# Or with button
if st.button('Go to Dashboard'):
    st.switch_page('dashboard.py')

# Alternative: Use st.Page objects and rerun
if st.button('Navigate'):
    st.session_state.current_page = 'dashboard'
    st.rerun()

page_with_function.code:
# In pages_lib/my_page.py
def show():
    st.title('My Page')
    st.write('Page content here')
    
    if st.button('Next'):
        st.switch_page('next.py')  # No pages/ folder needed

# In main app (app.py)
import streamlit as st
from pages_lib import my_page

pages = {
    'My Page': st.Page(my_page.show, title='My Page')
}

pg = st.navigation(pages)
pg.run()
page_with_function.description: Define page as a function from imported module

navigation_with_state.code:
# Initialize current page in session state
if 'current_page' not in st.session_state:
    st.session_state.current_page = 'home'

# Define page functions
def home():
    st.title('Home')
    st.session_state.current_page = 'home'

def data():
    st.title('Data')
    st.session_state.current_page = 'data'

# Define pages
pages = {
    'Home': st.Page(home),
    'Data': st.Page(data),
}

pg = st.navigation(pages, position='sidebar')
pg.run()
navigation_with_state.description: Navigation with session state tracking (no pages/ folder)
